details.test: Task 2: Submit couples therapy inquiry for 75-minute session
Task 3: Estimate out-of-pocket cost and include in consultation request
Task 4: Create favorites list of Spanish-speaking teletherapy depression therapists (adapted)
Task 5: Register two attendees for most affordable stress group
Task 6: Reschedule upcoming appointment to valid morning slot
Task 7: Complete Adult Intake questionnaire with specified selections
Task 8: Save 3 recent sleep-related resources to reading list
Task 9: Request in-person appointment at ADA-accessible, free-parking office
